name: Black Swan's Dance
acquisitionSource: Clear Psyche Deepdive: Passion to Dust
descriptionTemplate: Increase a chosen Awakener's Aliemus by [Arg2], and the Temp. Crit. Rate & Crit. DMG of their Command Cards by [Arg1]%. If Liz is in team, create 1 {Corrupted Flames} with {Exhaust}.
lore: Light steps. A sharp turn. A spin. At the crescendo of the music, she dives headlong into flames. Burn. Burning is the only answer her dance can give.
